category_sources: source_facts.description says cpplint is a static code checker for C++; PyPI description says it checks C++ files against Google's style guide.
display_name_sources: source_facts.name is cpplint; PyPI and official GitHub repository use cpplint.
docs_sources: Official GitHub README is the primary project documentation; PyPI page includes official package documentation and verified project links.
repo_sources: source_facts.repo is empty; PyPI project links Repository/Homepage to GitHub cpplint/cpplint and provenance lists cpplint/cpplint as the source repository.
tags_sources: source_facts.description, PyPI project description, and PyPI tags identify C++ linting/style checking and Python packaging.
